scripts.dev:prep: npm run build -w @blinds/config && npm run build -w @blinds/integrations
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:prep && npm run infra:up && concurrently -k --names commerce,storefront,ops-api --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "npm:dev:commerce" "npm:dev:storefront:wait" "npm:dev:ops-api"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:prep && npm run infra:up && concurrently -k --names commerce,storefront,ops-api,chat,workers --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta,yellow,gray "npm:dev:commerce" "npm:dev:storefront:wait" "npm:dev:ops-api" "npm:dev:chat" "npm:dev:workers:wait"
scripts.infra:down: node ./scripts/cloud-sql-proxy.mjs down && redis-cli shutdown nosave 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.dev:storefront:wait: node ./scripts/wait-for-http.mjs --url http://localhost:9000/health --label commerce -- npm run dev -w @blinds/storefront
scripts.dev:workers:wait: node ./scripts/wait-for-http.mjs --url http://localhost:9000/health --label commerce -- npm run dev -w @blinds/workers
